hyperedges.label: JSON Sentinel Output Protocol (PS scripts + parser)
Auth Store Log Aggregation and UI Display Flow
Bulk User Creation Flow: CreateUsersView → usersStore.runBulkCreate → IPC → PowerShell
Pinia Store Coordination: usersStore calls authStore for logging and toast notifications on every IPC action
License Display Pipeline: usersStore.licenseMap + humanLicenseLabel → UsersView badges & DashboardView bars

nodes.label: Design Decision: Bulk create only creates NEW users — existing UPN = error, no update
nodes.norm_label: design decision: bulk create only creates new users — existing upn = error, no update

nodes.label: Feature: Auto A3 License Assignment (Schüler/Lehrer) on new user creation
nodes.norm_label: feature: auto a3 license assignment (schuler/lehrer) on new user creation

nodes.label: Security: Passwords in-memory only, temp CSV deleted, OAuth2 delegated auth
nodes.norm_label: security: passwords in-memory only, temp csv deleted, oauth2 delegated auth

nodes.label: Design Note: UPN Normalization implemented in 4 places (index.js, ps1, editor.html, CreateUsersView)
nodes.norm_label: design note: upn normalization implemented in 4 places (index.js, ps1, editor.html, createusersview)

nodes.label: IPC Channel Catalogue: get-users, update-user, reset-password, reset-mfa, open-csv-dialog, get-csv-data, set-csv-data, run-password-update, check-pwsh
nodes.norm_label: ipc channel catalogue: get-users, update-user, reset-password, reset-mfa, open-csv-dialog, get-csv-data, set-csv-data, run-password-update, check-pwsh

nodes.label: Rationale: No backend server — all local via PowerShell + Graph, no persistent DB
nodes.norm_label: rationale: no backend server — all local via powershell + graph, no persistent db

nodes.label: Instruction: Read project.md first as single source of truth before any work

nodes.norm_label: app icon: microsoft 365 style hexagonal logo (blue-purple gradient)
